channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: INDYCAR Drivers Star in Ads Ahead of 2026 Season
item.description: Get those engines warmed up for the 2026 INDYCAR season with a few new ads featuring some of the sport's most famous faces.

item.title: 'The Big One' At Daytona 500 Involves 20 Cars In Huge Wreck Up Front
item.description: Sunday's Daytona 500 was relatively smooth-sailing through the first 123 laps, and then "The Big One" happened.

item.title: Kylan Boswell Returns as No. 8 Illinois Beats Indiana, 71-51
item.description: No. 8 Illinois rebounded from back-to-back overtime losses with a 71-51 victory over Indiana on Sunday.

item.title: 2026 NFL Coaching/GM Tracker: Seahawks Poach From Rival for Klint Kubiak Replacement
item.description: The coaching carousel for the 2026 offseason continues to churn. Here are the latest news and rumors from around the NFL!

item.title: How Much Is the 2026 Daytona 500 Purse? See the Record Prize Money, Payout
item.description: The purse for the Daytona 500 has increased for the fourth consecutive year, with the 2026 total breaking motorsports records.

item.title: Follow live: World takes on Team Stars in round-robin
Harper: Taken aback by Phillies' public critique
item.description: Phillies first baseman Bryce Harper says "it's kind of wild to me still" that president of baseball operations Dave Dombrowski suggested in October th...

item.title: LeBron: Still unsure about future past this year
item.description: LeBron James said Sunday he's still unsure whether he'll continue playing past this season.

item.title: Wilson drops gloves in rare Olympic hockey fight
item.description: Tom Wilson dropped the gloves late in Canada's game against France, going after the player who delivered a forearm to the head of teammate Nathan MacK...

item.title: U.S. wins big over Germany: Top moments from men's Olympic hockey
item.description: With the win, the U.S. has clinched a spot in the quarterfinals. Catch all the goals and top plays here.
